scripts.build: npm run build:ts && npm run build:rules
scripts.build:ts: cross-conf-env browserify --extension=bt --extension=flow -s npm_package_name npm_package_config_app -o npm_package_config_bundle -p [tsify -p="tsconfig.json"] -t [preprocessify --contextFile build/debug.json] --no-bundle-external --debug
scripts.watch:lint: cross-conf-env watch 'npm run lint' npm_package_config_watch || exit 0
scripts.watch:ts: cross-conf-env watchify  --extension=bt --extension=flow -s npm_package_name npm_package_config_app -o npm_package_config_bundle -p [tsify -p="tsconfig.json"] -t [preprocessify --contextFile build/debug.json] --no-bundle-external --debug -dv
scripts.watch: parallelshell 'npm run watch:ts' 'npm run watch:lint' 'npm run watch:rules'
scripts.prerelease: npm run clean && npm run build:rules && npm run lint
scripts.release: cross-conf-env browserify --extension=bt --extension=flow -s npm_package_name npm_package_config_app -o npm_package_config_bundle -p [tsify --removeComments -p="tsconfig.json"] -t [preprocessify --contextFile build/release.json] --no-bundle-external
